name: Pumpkin Muffins 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, vegetable oil, eggs, salt, cinnamon, water, and pumpkin until well blended.
2. Gradually add the flour, ginger, cloves, baking soda, vanilla, and nuts to the mixture. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Pour the batter into muffin cups that have been greased or lined with paper liners.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
